command: Write-Host 'Closing Chrome...'; Stop-Process -Name chrome -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Host 'Restarting Chrome with CDP...'; Start-Process 'C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe' -ArgumentList '--remote-debugging-port=9222','--user-data-dir=C:\Users\Revexn\AppData\Local\Google\Chrome\User Data','--profile-directory=Default','https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/0/add-a-place'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Host 'Checking CDP...'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:9222/json' -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host 'CDP OK - Pages:'; $r | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  Title: $($_.title) | URL: $($_.url)" } } catch { Write-Host "CDP check failed: $_" }
description: إعادة تشغيل Chrome مع CDP مفعّل
